narrative:
Newport Twp township has 1,347 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
